comment: Built-in wake-phrase catalog (M3). Serves the settings wakeWord combobox (contracts/settings.schema.json#/properties/wakeWord, docs/web-ui-spec.md §3.3/§4) so the control is populated, never free-typed. User-trained phrases and the CloudFront-regenerated catalog pipeline arrive in M6; until then this static file is the whole catalog. `engines` lists which wake engines can serve the phrase today; `modelAvailable.web` marks whether a browser (openWakeWord ONNX) model for the phrase is bundled under /static/models yet.
